results.title: What's new in Claude Opus 4.7 - Claude API Docs
results.snippet: 28 minutes ago - Overview of new features, breaking changes, and behavior changes in Claude Opus 4.7.

results.title: Introducing Claude Opus 4.7
results.snippet: 1 week ago - Security professionals who wish to use Opus 4.7 for legitimate cybersecurity purposes (such as vulnerability research, penetration testing, and red-teaming) are invited to join our new Cyber Verification Program. Opus 4.7 is available today across all Claude products and our API, Amazon Bedrock, ...

results.title: Release notes | Claude Help Center
results.snippet: 1 week ago - Our latest model, Claude Opus 4.7, is now generally available. Opus 4.7 shows improvements in software engineering and complex, long-running coding tasks, as well as better vision, allowing it to see images in higher resolution.

result.note: Pick the most relevant URLs and call fetch_page on each.

result.title: Claude 4.7 — Anthropic
result.text:
Claude 4.7
Claude 4.7 launches with a 1-million-token context window, an improved thinking mode for complex reasoning, and faster output on Sonnet and Haiku tiers.
Pricing remains unchanged from 4.6.

Pricing remains unchanged from 4.6.

result.title: Launch tweet
result.text: Claude 4.7 is here. 1M context. Better thinking. Same price.
